Valturna is indicated for the treatment of hypertension.
Add-on Therapy
A patient whose blood pressure is not adequately controlled with aliskiren alone or valsartan (or another
angiotensin receptor blocker) alone may be switched to combination therapy with Valturna.
Replacement Therapy
